## Type of change
- [ ] ➕ New project

## Quality checklist
- [ ] The project is **buildable** (laptop / free-tier GPU / modest API budget, or requirements noted)
- [ ] It includes **skills proven** + a **difficulty** (🟢 / 🟡 / 🔴)
- [ ] It includes **at least one typed, annotated, license-noted reference**
- [ ] Referenced code to adapt is **MIT / Apache-2.0 / CC0** (or the license is flagged as non-commercial / copyleft)
- [ ] Entry matches the existing `catalog/<theme>.md` format
- [ ] If a project was added, I updated the **count** in `README.md` (Contents table + total)
- [ ] Links are live
